top_signals.title: Chip Stocks Extend Rout as TSMC Results Fall Short of High Bar
top_signals.summary: A selloff in Asian chip stocks gathered pace, as Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.’s strong results failed to clear investors’ lofty expectations, stoking worries over heavy spending and a weaker outlook for profitability.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Guidance: Sustainability Reporting Guidance 2026-27
top_signals.summary: Guidance on sustainability reporting requirements for central government annual reports and accounts, which may be used by other public sector bodies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Eoptolink Is Said to File for Up to $5 Billion Hong Kong Listing
top_signals.summary: Eoptolink Technology Inc., a Chinese maker of optical transceivers, has filed confidentially for a multibillion-dollar listing in Hong Kong, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Netflix shares slide on disappointing growth forecasts
top_signals.summary: Streaming giant projects weakest revenue increase in three years
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Iran Risks Overplaying Its Hand on Hormuz - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Iran Risks Overplaying Its Hand on Hormuz  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. refining capacity decreased during 2025
top_signals.summary: U.S. operable atmospheric distillation capacity, the primary measure of refinery capacity, totaled 18.2 million barrels per calendar day (b/cd) on January 1, 2026-down over 250,000 b/cd (about 1%) compared with January 1, 2025-according to our latest annual Refinery Capacity Report.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
